visual.photography: Bright lifestyle photography, smoothie bowls from above, active living moments
visual.lighting_default: Bright morning light, clean whites, high key, sunrise tones
visual.style: Energetic, clean, optimistic, vibrant wellness without being clinical

voice.language_mix: English 85% + Bahasa Malaysia 15%, upbeat and casual

personas: Young professional starting a morning wellness routine
Fitness enthusiast seeking clean plant-based fuel
Busy millennial wanting quick healthy meal options

motion_language.name: Sunrise Ritual
motion_language.vibe: Fresh morning energy, clean and alive
motion_language.audio: Blender whirring, liquid pouring, spoon scraping smoothie bowl, upbeat ambient track
motion_language.motion: Slow-mo pour into glass, blending vortex, overhead smoothie bowl assembly, splash freeze-frame
motion_language.language: Morning ritual energy — fresh, alive, aspirational but achievable

tiktok.camera_movement: Overhead pour shot, zoom into bowl toppings, 360 spin on product
tiktok.typical_use: Morning routine clips, smoothie bowl assembly ASMR, quick wellness tips

instagram.stories: Daily ritual prompts, swipe-up for recipes, quick ingredient spotlights
instagram.feed_carousel: 9:16 portrait images, bright flat-lay shots, ingredient-to-bowl sequences
instagram.reels_carousel: 9:16 portrait motion clips, satisfying pour and blend sequences

youtube_shorts.camera_movement: Ingredient toss into blender, slow reveal of finished bowl, taste reaction
youtube_shorts.typical_use: Recipe walkthroughs, ingredient education, wellness routine vlogs
